maintainer.name: f0xx / community
maintainer.description: Unofficial. No Gentoo project QA. Prefer GitHub issues/PRs.

use.flag: Install udev rules, ACPI/sleep hooks, and OpenRC hotkey / lid services
Build oot hid-asus.ko from local kernel sources at emerge time (fail-closed preflight; never ships a prebuilt .ko). Override risky kernels with ZENBOOK_KERNEL_FORCE=1. UX8406 docked keyboard.
Install platform-session, duo-dock / screen-swap CLIs, systemd sleep hook, session.json.example, and Plasma docs. KCModule is built separately via plasma/kcm/build.sh (KF6/Qt6 dev packages).
Install platform-fan / platform-fan-control, OpenRC unit, and /etc/zenbook-scripts fan-control example
UX5400 ScreenPad CLI, udev rules, and OpenRC/systemd units
